description_long: This is a compact, round, two-tiered wooden shelf or side cabinet with a modern minimalist design. The structure consists of three circular wooden surfaces: a top, a middle shelf, and a base, all supported by a single central cylindrical post. The wood has a dark, rich finish with visible grain patterns, giving it a sophisticated and contemporary appearance. The open design allows for easy access to both the top and middle surfaces, making it suitable for displaying or storing small items. The absence of doors, drawers, or handles emphasizes its simplicity and functionality. This piece would fit well in urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or as a side table on a sidewalk café.
description: A modern, round, two-tiered wooden shelf with a dark finish and open design, supported by a central post. Its minimalist style makes it ideal for urban interiors or exteriors.
description_view_0: The side view highlights the circular top, middle shelf, and base, with the central post slightly off-center.
description_view_1: The front view shows the alignment of the three circular surfaces and the central post directly in the middle.
description_view_2: This angled view reveals the offset of the central post and the open access to both shelves.
description_view_3: The opposite front view displays the symmetry of the shelves and the central support post.
